title: selaginella fulvicaulis
intro: Selaginella fulvicaulis, also known as the yellow bird's nest or golden bird's nest, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Selaginella fulvicaulis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
